text.p: Thanks always for your love. is much better now and I trust God that she is perfectly healed. Thank God that I did not have to go and sit down for the whole day in the hospital. I beleieve we will all continue to enjoy the peace of God. We are all fine.
How is ? He must be happy now that the school is opened. How are my sons too and brother? How is your work also?

Thanks for your advice on the letter.I will make the amendments accordingly, scan it and send it to you soonest, most likely through another e-mail address that is easier for me to send such through here. I don't normally receive mails with it because it is expensive.
I got the Prof's e-mail address again. It is
I was advised that brother explains what he is interested in and maybe his C.V. He can also ask if there will be conferences or workshops soon. The address is again
There is no space between the letters. I just wrote it like this so that you are sure of it.

Thanks for your prayers. My supervisor says the money is not ready yet but it will soon be. he even lent me some money last week, so that I can survive till that comes.TWOWS has sent my money too to the first six months of this year but it is not through yet.
